description: A sterile, single-use catheter designed for vascular access procedures in interventional cardiology and radiology settings.
intended use: To provide vascular access for the delivery of therapeutic agents, placement of stents, and diagnostic sampling in cardiovascular procedures.
indications: Indicated for use in adult patients undergoing coronary angiography, PCI, and peripheral vascular interventions.
patient population: Adult patients (18 years and over) requiring vascular access.
intended users: Interventional cardiologists and radiologists with specialist training.
notified body: BSI Group The Netherlands BV, NB 2797
contraindications: Known hypersensitivity to device materials; severe peripheral vascular disease.
